### Post by uylug on 2009-08-30
Quick question: Do you often switch between users?

For some reason, compiz stops working. I have only gotten it to work again by resetting my settings

```
rm .compiz -r
rm .config/compiz -r
```

Restart your computer

---

### Post by uylug on 2009-08-30
> **chuckbenger said:**
> no i didnt get any errors running your commands and heres the output of compiz

Checking for Xgl: not present. 
xset q doesn't reveal the location of the log file. Using fallback /var/log/Xorg.0.log 
Detected PCI ID for VGA: 
Checking for texture_from_pixmap: Segmentation fault
not present. 
Trying again with indirect rendering:
Checking for texture_from_pixmap: Segmentation fault
not present. 
aborting and using fallback: /usr/bin/metacity

Whoa. I really have no idea right now.

All i can think of is your settings are messed up. Try this:

Add a new user
```
sudo useradd testuser -m
```

Set a password
```
sudo passwd testuser
```

Logout and login as testuser using the password you chose and enable effects.

Then remove the user by doing
```
sudo userdel testuser
```

---
